decision.summary: No new action: the weekly 72k dip remains the only active thesis trade, and the remaining Apr 21 daily board is too exhausted to justify a new entry.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and Binance spot is 75541.27. The weekly 72k dip remains active as the structural bearish position. The old 77k reach is still open but deeply discarded for slot purposes at about 7.25%, so it no longer blocks anything. However, there is no valid late-session replacement: the 75k dip is already fully priced at 99.95%, while the next downside strike, the 74k dip, is only about 7.5%, far below the preferred tradable band and requiring an overextended final leg lower very late in the UTC session. The playbook specifically warns against forcing a daily that is more likely to resolve one day late or after most of the move already happened. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone, so the correct action is simply to hold the weekly thesis and skip new daily risk.
